news.title: CWB’s 19% YTD Return Shows How Convertible Bonds Bridge Stock Gains and Income Floor
news.description: Convertible bonds sit in an odd corner of capital markets: corporate debt with an embedded equity option, paying coupon income while carrying upside tied to the issuer’s stock.
